summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UG University Assistant content generation system. Backend APIs 100% functional with all content generation endpoints working. Frontend course detail pages display content status badges, summaries, quiz functionality, and module scripts correctly. Minor UI improvements needed for tab states and script content display.

ui_bugs.issue: Script content not displaying in script cards - shows cards but content area is empty
Quiz and Scripts tabs not properly disabled for courses without content (should check questions_count=0 and scripts_count=0)

design_issues.issue: CTA only appears for courses with no content at all, but courses with partial content (summary but no questions/scripts) don't show generation option

passed_tests: Backend content generation API endpoints (23/23 tests passed)
Course status endpoint returns correct status badges (Published/Pending/Generating)
Course summary displays correctly in Overview tab
Quiz tab shows question count and difficulty breakdown (Easy: 12, Medium: 12, Hard: 0)
Quiz functionality: start quiz, select answer, submit answer, see explanation, next question
Scripts tab displays module avatar scripts with duration (~2-12 minutes)
Modules tab shows course structure with expandable items
No empty course pages - all courses show status and structure
Course detail page loads for both published and pending courses
Status badges correctly show Published (green) and Pending (gray)
Course metadata display (semester, modules, hours, questions count)
Tab navigation between Overview, Modules, Quiz, Scripts
Research sources display in Overview tab
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix script content display in Scripts tab - script text is not showing in the pre element. Also consider improving tab disabled states to check actual content counts (questions_count=0, scripts_count=0) rather than just course status.
